name: hunyuan-glb-generator
description: Automate local Hunyuan3D image-to-GLB and batch GLB asset generation for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Generate GLB assets through a local Hunyuan3D install.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex instructions and local MCP tools for starting a configured Hunyuan3D portable API, sending image-to-3D requests, queueing batch jobs, tracking progress, and saving generated GLB assets into project folders.
defaultPrompt: Generate a GLB from this reference image.
Queue a batch of GLB assets.
